note: Phase A0 round-2 iteration after Phase A.5 reviewer verdict (comment 8bd7a35c, findings 1-12). Re-cataloged the 9 stakeholder metrics with: (1) single locked sign convention sourced from dealer_assumption block (sign_dealer(call)=-1, sign_dealer(put)=+1) — finding 1; (2) dealer_net_gamma scope-distinct (front-month-only) from net_gex (full-chain), in shares-per-1% units — finding 2; (3) gamma_flip renamed to gex_zero_cross_strike with strike-axis semantics matching the algorithm — finding 3; (4) concrete v7/v8 API endpoint URLs in asset fields, loop semantics in notes — finding 10; (5) iv_rank link_status phase-gated unsupported-then-proxy — finding 6; (6) neutral phrasing for dim_macro_events — finding 12. Metric distribution: exact (4): spot, max_pain, pc_ratio_oi, hv20; proxy (1): iv30; unsupported (4): net_gex, gex_zero_cross_strike, dealer_net_gamma, iv_rank-cold-start. Awaiting Phase A.5 re-review before mart.yml.phase advances.

Phase A round-2 iteration. BRD now version 0.2 with §B-1 changelog row documenting the round-2 fixes. §B-2 carries a 'Dealer Assumption' subsection that locks the GEX sign convention single-sourced from source_catalog.dealer_assumption (closes finding 1). §B-3 row for net_gex carries the full formula with sign_dealer(type) as a derived value; row for dealer_net_gamma documents scope-distinct (front-month-only) + unit-distinct (shares-per-1%) framing (closes finding 2); row for gex_zero_cross_strike (renamed from gamma_flip) carries strike-axis semantics and 'Strike-axis GEX zero cross @ current spot' dashboard label (closes finding 3); row for iv30 pins linear-in-total-variance interpolation (closes finding 5); row for iv_rank carries phase-gated link_status with explicit cold-start→proxy transition (closes finding 6); row for spot carries Yahoo v8 chart endpoint OHLC for same-trading_date semantics (closes finding 9). §B-4 L-4 carries the T1.6b parametric-sensitivity mitigation (closes finding 4). §B-4 L-6 + L-7 added to document spot-comparator alignment and freshness-threshold unification. brd_signed=false; awaiting reviewer approval before signature.

Phase A item-A patch + sign (reviewer comment 751fbe78). Rephrased L-7 + TEST PLAN §Tier 2 as a single inequality on `last_pull_ts_utc - most_recent_session_close` to remove the round-2 'pull_age' / 'age vs lag' ambiguity; same predicate, same data — STALE iff T2.1 inequality false. BRD version bumped to 0.3, signature block filled per reviewer pre-authorisation. mart.yml.phase = A_signed, brd_signed = true at commit 6e777a0.

Phase B TDD draft against the signed BRD. T-1..T-21 all populated. Two ODS contract tables (chain snapshot, price history) per T-9; column catalog in 6-col format across T-9..T-14. T-3 ports the nine BRD §B-3 metrics with SQL-grade `calculation_logic`. T-13 has explicit SQL/formula for max_pain (per-side dedup CTE — closes T3.3 / `bae4af2` cardinality bug), iv30 (linear-in-total-variance interpolation), net_gex (full-chain SUM with locked sign_dealer), dealer_net_gamma (front-month SUM with provenance n_rows_used + scope_label for T3.4), and gex_zero_cross_strike (deterministic tie-break = nearest spot, lower strike on equidistant ties — closes reviewer item C). T-14 ADS exposes `pull_lag_hours` + `is_stale` driven by BRD L-7 inequality and `iv_rank_link_status_active` as a deterministic CASE expression — owned by Phase D /mart-dqc per reviewer item E. T-18 DQC plan carries 1%-of-abs(dealer_net_gamma) epsilon for T3.4 (item B), scope-distinct provenance check, and T1.6b denominator floor at 1e6 USD (item D). T-19 lists 15 test cases (12 dbt + 3 Python). tdd_signed=false; awaiting Phase B.5 review.
